outcomes.label: Strong payrolls
outcomes.rationale: Strong labor market: yields & USD up; equities firm on growth.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: In-line jobs; limited reaction.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Weak payrolls
outcomes.rationale: Weak jobs: growth worry; yields & USD fall, equities slip, gold bid.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Above consensus (hot)
outcomes.rationale: Hotter inflation → higher-for-longer rates; risk sells off, USD firms.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: In-line print; muted, mechanical reaction.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Below consensus (cool)
outcomes.rationale: Softer inflation → rate-cut hopes; risk rallies, USD eases.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Risk-on bias
outcomes.rationale: New-moon folklore: a mild risk-on tilt.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.label: No clear effect
outcomes.rationale: Most likely: no meaningful lunar effect.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.label: Risk-off bias
outcomes.rationale: Occasionally the opposite of the folklore.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.label: As expected
outcomes.rationale: Base case: outcome near expectations, limited market impact.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Surprise
outcomes.rationale: Tail case: an unexpected result drives a larger move in linked assets.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Hike
outcomes.rationale: Higher rates: yields & USD up, risk assets and gold fall.
outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.label: Hold
outcomes.rationale: No change; reaction driven by the statement and dot plot.
outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.label: Cut
outcomes.rationale: Lower rates: yields & USD fall, risk assets and gold rally.
outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.rationale: Full-moon folklore: a mild risk-off tilt.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.label: Hold
outcomes.rationale: No change; reaction driven by the statement and dot plot.
outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.label: Cut
outcomes.rationale: Lower rates: yields & USD fall, risk assets and gold rally.
outcomes.provenance: Fed funds futures (ZQ front month): implied 3.70% vs effective 3.63% (+7bps → leans a hold). Front-month average; per-meeting contract data is paid.

outcomes.label: As expected
outcomes.rationale: Base case: outcome near expectations, limited market impact.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Surprise
outcomes.rationale: Tail case: an unexpected result drives a larger move in linked assets.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Above consensus
outcomes.rationale: Stronger growth lifts equities; yields and USD firm.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: Growth as expected; muted.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Below consensus
outcomes.rationale: Weaker growth weighs on equities; yields and USD ease.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Above consensus (hot)
outcomes.rationale: Hotter inflation → higher-for-longer rates; risk sells off, USD firms.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: In line
outcomes.rationale: In-line print; muted, mechanical reaction.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Below consensus (cool)
outcomes.rationale: Softer inflation → rate-cut hopes; risk rallies, USD eases.
outcomes.provenance: Historical base rates (illustrative)

outcomes.label: Risk-off bias
outcomes.rationale: Full-moon folklore: a mild risk-off tilt.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.label: No clear effect
outcomes.rationale: Most likely: no meaningful lunar effect.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance

outcomes.label: Risk-on bias
outcomes.rationale: Occasionally the opposite of the folklore.
outcomes.provenance: Lunar-cycle folklore — low evidence; see historical significance
